title: Evangelion Review Series by Meaphe
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Review Series by Meaphe             Quote Post by qu4d » Sun Sep 23, 2012 4:23 am Just stumbled upon her a few weeks ago and I thought it to be kinda refreshing. Episode 01 - http://youtu.be/ouOETiLJyEA Episode 02 - http://youtu.be/0LAG4vG5YMc Episode 03 - http://youtu.be/8rdF-IzbCD0 Episodes 04-08 - http://youtu.be/q8LIjIvsKMo Episode 09 - http://youtu.be/CQLOicxGsLI Episodes 10-14 - http://youtu.be/8K051CqaU44 Episode 15 - http://youtu.be/RVboOLfHepw Episodes 16-20 - http://youtu.be/iWu-BY27lak Episode 21 - http://youtu.be/YJQCJ3zGDc0 Episodes 22-26 - http://youtu.be/CKxRbFH25LU EoE - part 1 - http://youtu.be/5hjCGwJKXTI

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Sun Sep 23, 2012 11:48 am Haven't seen it all but it must say that it is pretty funny. Would wish that the review were more in-depth and of the lenght of the actual episodes but the way she does it is pretty funny as well, i guess. That said, it's kinda baffling how much she gets wrong, even things that are pretty clearly explained in the episodes. And it's slightly sad that she has doubts on NGE because of stupid's opinions. reviewer in episode 4-8 wrote: Let's talk about Shinji first because he seems to be the main character, he is very... Underwhelming, and that's not to say that he's a bad protagonist, because i can already see that he is to gradually become better during the series, i think we're meant to find him wimpy and whiny and almost annoying (Even thought he has every right to be that way considering all the shit he has to go through) but his current wimpiness is only there so that his evental rise to strengh and heroism will be that much more empowering . That's what i think anyway. I can't imagine he will be the same kid at the end of the show, or else it will just be a very weak story in my opinion. Right now, everyone around Shinji is more confident and more compelling and stronger, he has to join them in that level or surpass them or else i'll have to consider his character arc... A waste of time. So in that sense i think anything i say on Shinji right now will probably become untrue in probably a few episodes of time. We have already seen some drastic changes from his character from ep 1 to ep 8 and i believe it will continue ... I don't wanna be dissapointed in this character's arc so i hope i'm not wrong.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Sep 23, 2012 1:05 pm ...Is this a parody? No one can be that ignorant to Shinji's infamous traits like that, right?

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Sun Sep 23, 2012 1:08 pm AuraTwilight wrote: ...Is this a parody? No one can be that ignorant to Shinji's infamous traits like that, right?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Sep 24, 2012 3:51 pm I was under the impression that Shinji being a useless whino was basically the "Rosebud is his sled" of the anime community.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Mon Sep 24, 2012 5:08 pm Im watching the more recent "The End of Evangelion explained" vid and shes playing fast and loose with the pronounciations. Seele = Seal Magi = Magg-Aye Nerv = Nerf and Shinji is 'stressed out' Bless. and she calls Gendo 'Ikari' which....hang on...which makes sense actually, how often is Gendo actually spoken to or about as Gendo? He's Ikari or Commander or Commander Ikari to virtually everyone except (off the top of my head) Yui in various flashbacks and the odd time in Ep 21. I was under the impression that Shinji being a useless whino was basically the "Rosebud is his sled" of the anime community.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Sep 25, 2012 3:24 am I'm not saying I agree with that statement, but Shinji being a quote-unquote "Whiny emo f@ggot" is pretty much what i've seen people say is all they know about Evangelion. Like you can't get into the series without hearing that he's a crybaby.
